node.title: Explain why compact-tool results won ranking
node.summary: Added compact locate ranking transparency by surfacing a top-level selectionReason alongside per-candidate whyShort output, preserving stronger ranked reasons instead of discarding them, covering direct locate plus MCP round-trip behavior with regressions, validating focused locate tests and the full workspace suite, and rebuilding/restarting the release MCP daemon.
